claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured GME but skipped the adjacent CME / Professionals education area listed in the nav.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: CME is continuing education for practicing physicians, Tier 3.
claims.visibilityRationale: lane is future-lane only

claims.quote: Our EducationCME and ProfessionalsGME and ResidenciesMedical EducationResearch EducationAlumni Association
claims.claimText: Education portfolio includes a CME & Professionals track in addition to GME, Medical Education, and Research Education.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Continuing Medical Education serves practicing physicians (post-trainee) — Tier 3.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 focused on the body program tiles; the CME & Professionals navigation entry indicates a post-trainee CME track not captured.
claims.visibilityRationale: lane is future-lane only

unresolveds: claimId collisions: c1, c2, c3, c4 are each reused across /education and /medical-student-rotations sources. Downstream merger must namespace by sourceUrl.

Source family for /medical-student-rotations is tagged OTHER but content is functionally a medical-student-rotations/observership page. Reclassification recommended but not blocking since URL path is unambiguous.
Volunteer page (hm-vol-02) marked HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED on a NOT_STATED_ON_SOURCE quote — correctly avoided labeling absence as refusal.

A4TargetedRecoveryTasks.reason: /medical-student-rotations directs international physicians, residents, and medical students to the Global Education Office, but that office's page (with eligibility, duration, fee, ECFMG/USMLE/visa requirements, contact) was not captured.
A4TargetedRecoveryTasks.suggestedNarrowAction: Narrow fetch: houstonmethodist.org Global Education Office and HMObserver landing/contact pages. Do not broaden crawl.

A4TargetedRecoveryTasks.reason: Rotations page confirms offering but omits duration, fees, ECFMG/USMLE requirements, application deadlines, and accepting specialties (claims c6, c7, c8, a2_c3, a2_c4, a2_c5 all NOT_STATED).
A4TargetedRecoveryTasks.suggestedNarrowAction: Narrow fetch: any sub-pages under /academic-institute/education/medical/ enumerating rotation specialties, fees, durations, and eligibility forms.
